forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: → Stable; Metaculus 25% by 2029 unchanged; Iran war does not materially affect AI timelines
forecasts.reference_class: Metaculus community median 2028; 25% probability by 2029. Kalshi ~40%.

factors_up.factor: Mustafa Suleyman predicts human-level on most professional tasks in 12-18 months
Rapid scaling of compute and model capabilities continues in Q1 2026

factors_down.factor: Definition ambiguity — no consensus on what counts as AGI
Iran war could divert policy attention and energy from AI development
Only 3.75 years remain; diminishing time window

key_uncertainties: Whether current scaling laws continue to yield capability jumps
Whether any lab achieves a genuine breakthrough vs incremental progress

update_triggers.up: Major lab demonstrates robust general reasoning across novel domains
update_triggers.down: Scaling returns plateau; major labs acknowledge longer timelines

forecasts.question: Will economic consultancy lose ≥33% value/jobs by end 2030 due to AI?
forecasts.key_change: → Stable; McKinsey 10% cuts and 12K-20K AI agents deployed, but 33% threshold remains very high
forecasts.reference_class: Historical industry disruptions rarely exceed 20% decline in 5 years. McKinsey has cut ~12% since 2022 peak.

factors_up.factor: McKinsey deploying 12,000-20,000 AI agents replacing junior work
65% of enterprises say traditional consulting losing value

factors_down.factor: Consultancies adapting — pivoting to AI implementation services
33% threshold is extremely steep; current cuts are ~10-12%

key_uncertainties: Speed of AI capability improvement for complex strategic reasoning
Whether revenue shifts to AI services offset traditional consulting decline

update_triggers.down: Consulting revenue grows; AI becomes additive rather than substitutive

forecasts.question: Will Labour be largest party at next UK General Election?
forecasts.key_change: ↓ Labour slips to 17% in latest YouGov (4th place); Greens surge to 19-21%
forecasts.reference_class: Governing parties recovering from mid-term lows: ~40% of UK governments since 1945 lost subsequent election.

factors_up.factor: FPTP system rewards geographic concentration; Labour has structural seat advantage
3+ years to next election; time for recovery
Iran war could rally around government/reset political dynamics

factors_down.factor: Labour polling 17%, in 4th place behind Reform, Greens, and Conservatives
Green surge to 19-21% directly cannibalises Labour vote
Reform lead of 6-7pts appears structural, not transient

key_uncertainties: Whether FPTP translates Reform's lead into seats given geographic spread
Whether Starmer can consolidate centre-left vote before election

update_triggers.up: Labour recovers to 25%+; Green surge fades

forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2035?
forecasts.key_change: → Stable; Metaculus 50% by 2033 consensus holds; 8.75-year horizon provides ample runway
forecasts.reference_class: Metaculus median 2031 (80% CI 2027-2045). Expert surveys converging on early 2030s.

factors_up.factor: Expert consensus accelerating: median estimates now 2031-2033
OpenAI projecting $280B revenue by 2030 implies massive capability growth

factors_down.factor: Definition ambiguity persists; moving goalposts problem
Iran war and geopolitical instability could slow investment/cooperation

key_uncertainties: Whether scaling laws hold for another 8+ years
Whether geopolitical fragmentation slows international AI cooperation

update_triggers.down: Scaling plateau; major compute constraints; regulatory moratoria

forecasts.question: Will China initiate a military blockade or invasion of Taiwan before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: ↑ Iran war creates US strategic distraction; PRC defence budget up 7%; more bellicose Two Sessions language
forecasts.reference_class: US intel: China does not plan invasion in 2027, no fixed timeline. Base rate of major cross-strait military action: <5% per year.

factors_up.factor: US military distracted by Iran conflict; reduced Pacific deterrence credibility
PRC 2026 defence budget up 7% to $278B; more bellicose language at Two Sessions
Justice Mission 2025 exercises explicitly practised blockade

factors_down.factor: US intel assesses China has no 2027 invasion plan and no fixed timeline
Economic costs of blockade enormous for China's export-dependent economy

key_uncertainties: Whether Iran war emboldens or cautions China
Whether Taiwan legislature approves defence spending increase

update_triggers.up: China positions forces beyond exercise levels; US withdraws Pacific assets
update_triggers.down: US-China diplomatic engagement increases; exercises normalise

forecasts.question: Will UK annual CPI inflation fall below 2.0% for at least one month before 1 January 2027?
forecasts.key_change: ↓↓ Iran war energy shock transforms outlook; oil +20%, gas +50%; OECD forecasts 4% UK inflation; sub-2% essentially ruled out
forecasts.reference_class: CPI at 3.0% in Feb 2026. Post-Iran-war, OECD forecasts 4% for 2026. BoE pre-war forecast was 2.1% in Q2.

factors_up.factor: Ofgem cap cut to £1,616 in April provides some downward pressure
Small chance of ceasefire and rapid energy price normalisation

factors_down.factor: Iran war: oil +20%, gas +50%; Strait of Hormuz disrupted
OECD revised UK inflation from 2.5% to 4% for 2026
Core CPI rising (3.2% in Feb); services inflation sticky at 4.3%

key_uncertainties: Duration and intensity of Iran conflict
Whether UK government intervenes with energy price caps

update_triggers.up: Rapid ceasefire; Strait of Hormuz reopens; oil falls below $80
update_triggers.down: Conflict escalates; UK energy prices surge further

forecasts.question: Will Spider-Man: Brand New Day gross over $1.5B worldwide by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: ↓ Iran war economic headwinds could dampen global box office; but record 1B trailer views maintain strong base case
forecasts.reference_class: No Way Home grossed $1.92B. MCU tent-poles average $1.2B. Trailer hit 1B views in 4 days — unprecedented.

factors_up.factor: First movie trailer to cross 1 billion views
No Way Home grossed $1.92B; franchise momentum strong

factors_down.factor: Iran war creating economic uncertainty; higher energy costs reduce discretionary spending
Potential inflation-driven recession in key markets

key_uncertainties: Whether Iran war materially impacts global consumer spending by July

forecasts.question: Will OpenAI and Anthropic have a combined ARR exceeding $70B by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: → Stable; OpenAI $25B + Anthropic $19B = $44B combined; growth projections comfortably exceed $70B target
forecasts.reference_class: OpenAI ARR $25B (Feb), projecting 2.3x. Anthropic $19B ARR, projecting 4x. Combined projections: ~$85B by year-end.

factors_up.factor: Company projections sum to ~$85B by year-end
Enterprise AI adoption accelerating; 9M+ paying business users at OpenAI

factors_down.factor: Anthropic gross vs net revenue reporting may inflate apparent ARR
Growth may slow as bases get larger

key_uncertainties: Whether Anthropic's reported revenue includes hyperscaler commissions
Whether enterprise spending sustains through potential recession

update_triggers.up: Q2 reports show combined ARR above $55B
update_triggers.down: Growth deceleration; major enterprise deals delayed

forecasts.question: Will UK average annual real GDP growth exceed 1.5% across the 2030s (2030-2039)?
forecasts.key_change: ↓ Iran war energy shock damages near-term growth; OECD warns UK more vulnerable than peers; structural damage may persist into 2030s

factors_up.factor: AI productivity gains could lift trend growth in 2030s
OBR medium-term forecasts of 1.5-1.6% are right at the threshold

factors_down.factor: Iran war energy shock: UK more vulnerable due to import dependence
OECD revised UK inflation to 4%; stagflation risk
Public debt near 97% GDP limits fiscal space

key_uncertainties: Duration and long-term impact of Iran conflict
Whether AI adoption genuinely lifts UK productivity in the 2030s

update_triggers.up: Iran ceasefire; UK productivity growth accelerates; AI investment surge
update_triggers.down: Prolonged energy crisis; UK enters recession; debt spiral
